name: Maestro Productization Workflow
description: Turn Maestro-flow into a visual desktop product while delegating repetitive extraction work to lower-cost models.

target_app_path.description: Local path to Oh My Maestro desktop app

low_cost_model.description: Model or tool used for repetitive extraction

nodes.name: Checkpoint: Product Boundary
nodes.description: Confirm that Superset is used as a concept reference, not as MVP runtime dependency.

nodes.name: Plan Command Registry
nodes.args_template: Design a typed command registry for Oh My Maestro. Context: {prev_output_path}

nodes.name: Checkpoint: Registry Plan
nodes.description: Review the command registry interface and safe IPC command policy before extraction work begins.

nodes.name: Extract Command Metadata
nodes.args_template:
Task: Extract Maestro CLI command metadata for {goal}.

Use low-cost model/tool when available: {low_cost_model}.

Inputs:
- {maestro_flow_path}
- maestro --help
- maestro ralph --help
- maestro search --help
- maestro load --help

Deliver JSON command entries only. Mark write/destructive commands explicitly.

nodes.name: Map Superset Concepts
nodes.args_template:
Task: Map Superset concepts to Oh My Maestro product concepts.

Do not propose embedding Superset runtime for MVP.

Deliver a table mapping dashboard, chart, dataset, explore, saved query, and filter state to Maestro product equivalents.

nodes.name: Checkpoint: Generated Drafts Review
nodes.description: Codex or Claude Code reviews low-cost generated registry and Superset concept mapping before implementation.

nodes.name: Implement Registry-Driven UI
nodes.args_template: Implement the reviewed command registry and registry-driven UI in {target_app_path}. Use reviewed artifacts from {prev_output_path}.

nodes.name: Validate Product Shell
nodes.args_template: Validate command registry, IPC whitelist, workflow state fallback, and desktop build for {target_app_path}.

nodes.name: Review Integration Risk
nodes.args_template: Review security, command whitelist, generated metadata quality, and product boundary for {target_app_path}.
